chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-594 of 2018 Civil Revision N.S-44 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of M.A.No.2290/2019 (S/A). 3. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 02.10.2025 Mr. Sumair Ahmed Umrani, Advocate a/w Petitioner and for the applicant in Civil Revision No.S-44 of 2020. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Arif Hussain Kalhoro, Advocate for Respondent No.4. ------ At the very outset, learned counsel assisted by the petitioner submits that the purpose of instant petition, in view of the Order passed by Member, Land Utilization, Board of Revenue, has been served; hence under the instructions he does not wish to press this petition. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh as well as counsel for respondent No.4 have no objection. Order accordingly. As far as Civil Revision Application No.S-44/2020 is concerned, he seeks time for preparation and arguments. Besides he files an application under section 151 CPC for interim relief, taken on record. Let notice in Civil Revision Application be issued to the Additional Advocate General, Sindh as well as respondents for 06.10.2025, to be taken up at 11:00 a.m. Office is directed to number the application filed today and fix the matter as per roster. Office is further directed not to de-tag the files till final disposal of the Revision Application. Judge Judge Manzoor
